# ABS Contract Seed Layout

This directory is the placeholder root for the Phase 6 seeded ABS fixture library.

Expected scenario directories:

- `single-file-audiobook`
- `folder-multi-file-audiobook`
- `ebook-only-item`
- `mixed-metadata-completeness`
- `series-linked-item`
- `series-repeat-item`
- `permission-limited-account`

Keep the manifest in the parent directory as the contract source of truth for scenario IDs and intended behavior.
